name: /incident --interactive prompts for the detection mechanism on stdin and records it in the timeline per F-5
command: echo 'alert from monitoring' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" 'spike in 5xx' --date 2026-05-25 --interactive 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'detection: alert from monitoring' incidents/2026-05-25-001/timeline.md && echo captured 1>&2
